pages.text: The PUREX process is used to reprocess spent nuclear fuel. $(br2)1. Dissolution: Spent fuel is dissolved in Nitric Acid in the Solvent Extractor.$(br)2. Extraction: TBP is used to separate Uranium and Plutonium from Fission Products.$(br)3. Solidification: The nitrates are converted back to solid oxides in the Chemical Converter.

The Chemical Converter is used for the conversion chain: Yellowcake + HNO3 -> Uranyl Nitrate. Uranyl Nitrate + TBP -> UO2. UO2 + HF -> UF4. UF4 + F2 -> UF6. This realistic cycle is essential for fuel fabrication and enrichment.
